claudeResult.resultText:
The dashboard is on the canvas. It has a three-column KPI row (Build Pass Rate 94%, Avg Build Time 4m12s, Open Incidents 2) above a two-column grid holding the bar chart of build durations and the line chart of deploy counts, both keyed Mon–Sun.

The first attempt was rejected for two schema reasons, which I fixed: `gap` only accepts `none|sm|md|lg|xl` (I had used `xs`), and `Metric.delta` must be a string rather than a number, so the pass-rate delta is now `"+1.8%"`. Note that the delta and the trend arrows are illustrative — you didn't give week-over-week numbers, so if you have real ones I can patch them in.
